Class TweetController

  • Constructor Details

    • TweetController

      public TweetController(TweetRepository tweetRepository, TweetMapper tweetMapper)

  • Method Details

    • getAllTweets

      @GetMapping("/tweets") public reactor.core.publisher.Flux<TweetDTO> getAllTweets()

    • createTweets

      @PostMapping("/tweets") public reactor.core.publisher.Mono<TweetDTO> createTweets(@Valid @RequestBody @Valid TweetDTO tweetDTO)

    • getTweetById

      @GetMapping("/tweets/{id}") public reactor.core.publisher.Mono<org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<TweetDTO>> getTweetById(@PathVariable("id") String tweetId)

    • updateTweet

      @PutMapping("/tweets/{id}") public reactor.core.publisher.Mono<org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<TweetDTO>> updateTweet(@PathVariable("id") String tweetId, @Valid @RequestBody @Valid TweetDTO tweetDTO)

    • deleteTweet

      @DeleteMapping("/tweets/{id}") public reactor.core.publisher.Mono<org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<Void>> deleteTweet(@PathVariable("id") String tweetId)

    • streamAllTweets

      @GetMapping(value="/stream/tweets", produces="text/event-stream") public reactor.core.publisher.Flux<TweetDTO> streamAllTweets()
